prose.en: Implement anti-spoofing mechanisms to prevent adversaries from falsifying the security attributes indicating the successful application of the security process.

guidance.en: Some attack vectors operate by altering the security attributes of an information system to intentionally and maliciously implement an insufficient level of security within the system. The alteration of attributes leads organizations to believe that a greater number of security functions are in place and operational than have actually been implemented.

prose.en: anti-spoofing mechanisms are implemented to prevent adversaries from falsifying the security attributes indicating the successful application of the security process.

objects.en: procedures addressing the transmission of security and privacy attributes
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing anti-spoofing mechanisms
